inputs.name: emptyIndicatorMode
inputs.description: Specifies if an empty indicator should be displayed when there is no text.

inputs.name: maxCharacters
inputs.description: Maximum number of characters to be displayed initially. If the text length exceeds this limit, the text will be truncated with an ellipsis, and the "More" link will be displayed.

inputs.name: overflowMode
inputs.description: Determines how the full text will be displayed.
